'''âf-v-l''' ('''favala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:precel|precel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:precel|precel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-v-l
|-
! Lemma
| favala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:favalithi|favalithi]] || [[word:favaliji|favaliji]] || [[word:favalishi|favalishi]] || [[word:favali|favali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:favaluthuth|favaluthuth]] || [[word:favalujuj|favalujuj]] || [[word:favalushush|favalushush]] || [[word:faval|faval]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:favaluthu|favaluthu]] || [[word:favaluju|favaluju]] || [[word:favalushu|favalushu]] || [[word:favalu|favalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:favalufuth|favalufuth]] || [[word:favalufuj|favalufuj]] || [[word:favalufush|favalufush]] || [[word:favaluf|favaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:favalethe|favalethe]] || [[word:favaleje|favaleje]] || [[word:favaleshe|favaleshe]] || [[word:favale|favale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:favalothoth|favalothoth]] || [[word:favalojoj|favalojoj]] || [[word:favaloshosh|favaloshosh]] || [[word:faval|faval]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:favalotho|favalotho]] || [[word:favalojo|favalojo]] || [[word:favalosho|favalosho]] || [[word:favalo|favalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:favalofoth|favalofoth]] || [[word:favalofoj|favalofoj]] || [[word:favalofosh|favalofosh]] || [[word:favalof|favalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:favalĂŠthĂŠ|favalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:favalĂŠjĂŠ|favalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:favalĂŠshĂŠ|favalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:favalĂŠ|favalĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:favalathath|favalathath]] || [[word:favalajaj|favalajaj]] || [[word:favalashash|favalashash]] || [[word:faval|faval]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:favalatha|favalatha]] || [[word:favalaja|favalaja]] || [[word:favalasha|favalasha]] || [[word:favala|favala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:favalafath|favalafath]] || [[word:favalafaj|favalafaj]] || [[word:favalafash|favalafash]] || [[word:favalaf|favalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:favalasha|favalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofavalasha|gofavalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifavalasha|gokifavalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:favalnĂŒsha|favalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofavalnknĂŒsha|gofavalnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifavalnĂŒsha|gokifavalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:favalshĂ«sha|favalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofavalnkshĂ«sha|gofavalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifavalshĂ«sha|gokifavalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:favalrosha|favalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofavalnkrosha|gofavalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifavalrosha|gokifavalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:favalmusha|favalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofavalnkmusha|gofavalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifavalmusha|gokifavalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:favalsherasha|favalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofavalnksherasha|gofavalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifavalsherasha|gokifavalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:favalngasha|favalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofavalnkngasha|gofavalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifavalngasha|gokifavalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:favalyasha|favalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofavalnkyasha|gofavalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifavalyasha|gokifavalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:favalyamasha|favalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofavalnkyamasha|gofavalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifavalyamasha|gokifavalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:favalnĂŒshĂ«sha|favalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofavalnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gofavalnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifavalnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokifavalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:favalnĂŒrosha|favalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofavalnknĂŒrosha|gofavalnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifavalnĂŒrosha|gokifavalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:favalnĂŒmusha|favalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofavalnknĂŒmusha|gofavalnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifavalnĂŒmusha|gokifavalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:favalshĂ«nĂŒsha|favalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofavalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gofavalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifavalshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokifavalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:favalshĂ«rosha|favalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofavalnkshĂ«rosha|gofavalnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifavalshĂ«rosha|gokifavalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:favalshĂ«musha|favalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofavalnkshĂ«musha|gofavalnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifavalshĂ«musha|gokifavalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:favalronĂŒsha|favalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofavalnkronĂŒsha|gofavalnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifavalronĂŒsha|gokifavalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:favalroshĂ«sha|favalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofavalnkroshĂ«sha|gofavalnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifavalroshĂ«sha|gokifavalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:favalromusha|favalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofavalnkromusha|gofavalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifavalromusha|gokifavalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:favalmunĂŒsha|favalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofavalnkmunĂŒsha|gofavalnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifavalmunĂŒsha|gokifavalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:favalmushĂ«sha|favalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofavalnkmushĂ«sha|gofavalnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifavalmushĂ«sha|gokifavalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:favalmurosha|favalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofavalnkmurosha|gofavalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifavalmurosha|gokifavalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:faval|faval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:fĂŠvĂŠl|fĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofaval|hofaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hofĂŠvĂŠl|hofĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofaval|hohofaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofĂŠvĂŠl|hohofĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒfaval|nĂŒfaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒfĂŠvĂŠl|nĂŒfĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfaval|nĂŒnĂŒfaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠvĂŠl|nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻfaval|nĂŻfaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻfĂŠvĂŠl|nĂŻfĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfaval|nĂŻnĂŻfaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠvĂŠl|nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufaval|lufaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lufĂŠvĂŠl|lufĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufaval|lulufaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufĂŠvĂŠl|lulufĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifaval|lifaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lifĂŠvĂŠl|lifĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifaval|lilifaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifĂŠvĂŠl|lilifĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofaval|kofaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kofĂŠvĂŠl|kofĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofaval|kokofaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofĂŠvĂŠl|kokofĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefaval|kefaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kefĂŠvĂŠl|kefĂŠvĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefaval|kekefaval]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefĂŠvĂŠl|kekefĂŠvĂŠl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
